title: Calorie Deficit Calculator - Weight Loss Planner
description: Free calorie deficit calculator for weight loss. Calculate your TDEE and daily calorie target to lose weight safely. Science-based approach to fat loss.
keywords: calorie deficit calculator, weight loss calculator, TDEE calculator, calorie calculator, fat loss calculator
intro: Calculate your Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE) and the calorie deficit needed to reach your weight loss goal safely.

faq.a: A calorie deficit occurs when you consume fewer calories than your body burns. A deficit of 500 calories/day leads to approximately 1 pound of fat loss per week.

faq.q: How much calorie deficit is safe?
faq.a: A deficit of 500-1000 calories per day (1-2 lbs/week loss) is generally considered safe. Never go below 1200 calories/day for women or 1500 for men.
TDEE (Total Daily Energy Expenditure) is the total number of calories you burn per day including exercise and daily activities.
